task_completion.description: Navigate to the target coordinates in Chicago
task_completion.visual_evidence: Map view centered on or near 41.8839, -87.6416, or search bar showing these coordinates.

task_completion.description: Configure polygon name and color style
task_completion.visual_evidence: Polygon properties dialog visible. Name field contains 'Proposed Office Tower'. Style/Color tab shows a blue color selection and opacity less than 100%.
Polygon properties dialog (Altitude tab) visible. Settings show 'Relative to ground', Altitude '75' meters, and 'Extend sides to ground' is checked.

task_completion.description: Verify the polygon is rendered as a 3D extruded object
task_completion.visual_evidence: Angled or tilted map view showing the polygon as a 3D block/tower (not flat), located in the Chicago urban context.

task_completion.description: Save the KML file to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: File save dialog or file explorer showing the file 'proposed_building.kml' being saved to or existing in '/home/ga/Documents/'.

task_completion.description: Save the visualization screenshot to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: File save dialog or file explorer showing the file 'building_visualization.png' being saved to or existing in '/home/ga/Documents/'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a GIS application GUI (e.g., Google Earth Pro)
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the interface of a mapping application (toolbar, globe view, sidebar) rather than just code editors or terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not manually write the KML code
integrity.visual_evidence: No evidence of a text editor being used to write XML/KML tags manually.

integrity.description: Verify results come from genuine software interaction
integrity.visual_evidence: The 3D building appears rendered within the application's viewport, consistent with the surrounding 3D terrain/buildings.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Location: 41.8839, -87.6416 (Chicago). Building Name: 'Proposed Office Tower'. Height: 75m relative to ground. Appearance: Semi-transparent blue 3D extruded block.
